hooks.command: cd /home/ubuntu/projects/vivantel/virage && npm run fix && git add -u && npm run lint && npm run type-check:ci
hooks.statusMessage: Running lint:fix + format + lint + type-check before commit...

hooks.command: echo 'SKILL STANDARD: Load .agents/skills/skill-guru/SKILL.md before modifying skill files to ensure Agent Skills v1.0 compliance.'
echo 'SKILL STANDARD: Load .agents/skills/skill-guru/SKILL.md before creating skill files to ensure Agent Skills v1.0 compliance.'
echo 'PLANNER SKILL: Load .agents/skills/planner/SKILL.md before writing this plan file to follow the planning workflow.'
echo 'PLANNER SKILL: Load .agents/skills/planner/SKILL.md before editing this plan file to follow the planning workflow.'
echo '[Virage] Filesystem search detected. Consider mcp__virage__search for semantic search over indexed content — more targeted and token-efficient for codebase questions.'
echo 'DOCS: If this edit adds/removes/renames a user-visible feature (strategy, CLI flag, package, config field), load .agents/skills/doc_writer/SKILL.md and update README.md.'

prompt=$(cat); if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(plan|break.?down|roadmap|sequence|implement.?steps)\b'; then   echo '[Virage] Task matches planner skill (~1932 tokens). Call read_skill_summary("planner") to check fit, or read_skill("planner") for the full workflow.'; elif echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(ADR|architect|interface.?design|system.?design|refactor.?scope)\b'; then   echo '[Virage] Task matches architect skill (~1854 tokens). Call read_skill_summary("architect") to check fit.'; elif echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(docs?|README|CHANGELOG|document|write.?up)\b'; then   echo '[Virage] Task matches doc_writer skill (~807 tokens). Call read_skill_summary("doc_writer") to check fit.'; elif echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(review|security|vulnerabilit|audit)\b'; then   echo '[Virage] Task matches code-guardian skill (~2012 tokens). Call read_skill_summary("code-guardian") to check fit.'; fi
